Class AbstractTable

java.lang.Object
com.github.kusoroadeolu.clique.tables.AbstractTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Renderable, Table
Direct Known Subclasses:
BoxDrawTable, CompactTable, DefaultTable, MarkdownTable
public abstract class AbstractTable extends Object implements Table, Renderable
